⊢ @UniPoly.mul R inst✝¹ inst✝ a b ≈ @UniPoly.mul R inst✝¹ inst✝ b a

proof:
intro i
  rw [← coeff_toPoly, ← coeff_toPoly]
  suffices (a.mul b).toPoly = (b.mul a).toPoly by rw [this]
  simp [toPoly, eval₂, mul, smul, mulPowX, toPoly_add, toPoly_trim, Polynomial.mul_comm]
